name: Malicious PE Execution by Microsoft Visual Studio Debugger
description: Detects the execution of SyncAppvPublishingServer.vbs, potentially to proxy PowerShell code, by processes related to the Microsoft Visual Studio Debugger.

parameters.name: timestamp
parameters.description: The timestamp of the process creation event.

parameters.name: event_id
parameters.description: The Windows Security Event ID for Process Creation (4688).

parameters.name: process_name
parameters.description: The name of the process that was executed (e.g., cscript.exe or wscript.exe running SyncAppvPublishingServer.vbs).

parameters.name: process_path
parameters.description: The full path to the process that executed SyncAppvPublishingServer.vbs.

parameters.name: parent_process_name
parameters.description: The name of the parent process, expected to be a Visual Studio debugger component (e.g., vsjitdebugger.exe, vsimmersiveactivatehelper.exe, devenv.exe).

parameters.name: parent_process_path
parameters.description: The full path to the parent process.

parameters.name: command_line
parameters.description: The full command line used to execute SyncAppvPublishingServer.vbs.

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: The user account under which the process was executed.

parameters.name: host
parameters.description: The hostname where the event occurred.
